productDisplayName: Vans unisex Era Black Casual Shoes
description: Business as usual from vans – another stylish shoe with the comfort, durability and practicality we have come to expect from the brand. This shoe is a classic example of the minimal shape and clean modern style Vans are famous for. The black, white and grey printed checks give a businesslike look to a casual shoe. Upper Black fabric upper on the sides and printed fabric over the forefoot and heel cup for durability and comfort Leather collar for extra durability Lace-ups for a snug Fit Brand tab on the forefoot and brand name on the back, on the lasting Cushioned footbed Midsole EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Rubber outsole for durability Reverse waffle pattern for better grip Lasting with toe counter for extra protection to the toes Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
